yandex.description: Yandex is a Russian multinational corporation specializing in Internet-related products and services, including a search engine, online advertising, and more.

mj12bot.description: MJ12bot is a web crawler used for SEO and data analysis.

discord.description: Discord is a VoIP, instant messaging and digital distribution platform.

baidu.description: Baidu is a Chinese multinational technology company specializing in Internet-related services and products.

yahoo.description: Yahoo is a web services provider and a subsidiary of Verizon Communications.

google.description: Allow google search engine and other related services of google to index your site.

bing.description: Bing is a web search engine owned and operated by Microsoft.

apple.description: Allow Apple's web crawler to access your site, which is used for indexing and other services like Siri.

openAI.description: OpenAI is an artificial intelligence research organization.

ahrefs.description: Ahrefs is a toolset for SEO and marketing.

CCrawler.description: CCrawler is a web crawler for the Common Crawl project.

xAndTwitterIPList.description: Let x/twitter to access your site and display rich content on posts sharing your site.

facebook.description: Let meta platforms to access your site and display rich content on posts sharing your site.

pintrest.description: Let Pinterest to access your site and display rich content on posts sharing your site.

semrush.description: Semrush is a tool for SEO, PPC, content, social media, and competitive research.

telegram.description: Telegram is a cloud-based instant messaging, VoIP, and VoIP service.
